results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board
Fed's Interest Rate Decision: April 29, 2026 - dshort - Advisor Perspectives
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board | Al Jazeera
Federal Reserve Board - Federal Reserve issues FOMC statement
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end
Fed live updates: Trump says 'I don't care' that Chair Powell is staying at the Fed

summary: FOMC held rates at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026. Vote was 8-4. Powell's likely final meeting as chair; Kevin Warsh nominated as successor. Inflation elevated partly due to Middle East energy prices.
